sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17915" key="au)toskapaneu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-σκᾰπᾰνεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n17915.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very digger,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
